attributes.description: Detect and inventory Shadow AI tools on Linux endpoints — local LLMs, AI coding agents, AI desktop applications, MCP servers (with config content scanning), AI model files, Python/npm AI packages, browser extensions, Docker containers, systemd services, crontab entries, GPU-equipped systems, AI API key exposure, and AI tool configuration directories, vector databases, model cache sizes, and SSH tunnels for AI services.
attributes.name: ai-asset-discovery-linux

queries.query:
-- Running LLM Runtime Detection
-- Identifies local LLM servers, inference engines, and AI model serving processes
-- Covers: Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, vLLM, GPT4All, Jan, LocalAI, KoboldCpp,
-- text-generation-webui, Open WebUI, AnythingLLM, LiteLLM, llamafile, MLC LLM, ComfyUI
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'ollama', 'lms', 'gpt4all', 'jan', 'msty', 'local-ai',
    'koboldcpp', 'llama-server', 'llama-cli', 'vllm',
    'mlc_llm', 'mlc_chat', 'anythingllm', 'anything-llm',
    'litellm', 'open-webui', 'llamafile', 'text-generation-launcher',
    'text-generation-router', 'comfyui', 'invokeai'
,
    'msty',
    'exo',
    'tabby')
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%ollama serve%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%vllm.entrypoints%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%text-generation-launcher%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%koboldcpp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama-server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama.cpp%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llamafile%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mlc_llm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%open-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%localai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%text-generation-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%oobabooga%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%stable-diffusion-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%whisper%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%msty%serve%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%exo%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%tabby%serve%'
;

-- Running AI Coding Agent Processes
-- Detects AI coding assistants, agents, and AI-powered terminals
-- These tools can read/write files, execute code, and interact with internal systems
-- Covers: Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Aider, Cline, Roo Code,
-- Continue, Codeium, Tabnine, Amazon Q, Sourcegraph Cody, Codex, Warp, Zed,
-- Pieces, ShellGPT, OpenHands, Supermaven
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'claude', 'cursor', 'windsurf', 'warp', 'zed',
    'tabnine', 'TabNine', 'WasmTabNine',
    'codeium_language_server', 'supermaven',
    'amazon-q', 'pieces-os', 'Pieces OS',
    'codex', 'aider', 'sgpt'
,
    'augment',
    'codex',
    'goose',
    'devin',
    'amp')
    -- Claude Code / Claude Desktop
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic-ai/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude_desktop%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%com.anthropic.claudedesktop%'
    -- Cursor
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor.app%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor Helper%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%cursor-retrieval%'
    -- Windsurf / Codeium
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Windsurf%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium_language_server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium%enterprise%'
    -- GitHub Copilot
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%github.copilot%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-agent%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-language-server%'
    -- OpenAI Codex CLI
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@openai/codex%'
    -- Aider
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider-chat%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider%--model%'
    -- Cline / Roo Code (VS Code extensions spawn node)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    -- Continue.dev
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continue.continue%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continuedev%'
    -- Amazon Q / CodeWhisperer
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%amazon-q%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codewhisperer%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%AmazonWebServices.amazon-q%'
    -- Sourcegraph Cody
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%sourcegraph.cody%'
    -- Tabnine
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%tabnine%'
    -- Warp terminal (has AI built in)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.warp.Warp%'
    -- Zed editor (has AI built in)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.zed.Zed%'
    -- ShellGPT
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell_gpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell-gpt%'
    -- OpenHands / SWE-agent
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openhands%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%swe-agent%'
    -- Pieces
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pieces-os%'
    -- Supermaven
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%supermaven%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%augment%code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openai/codex%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%goose%session%'
;

-- AI API Servers Exposed on Network
-- Detects AI services listening on non-loopback addresses (network-exposed)
-- Ports: 11434 Ollama, 1234/43411 LM Studio, 4891 GPT4All, 1337 Jan,
-- 5001 KoboldCpp, 7860 Gradio/HF, 8080 llama.cpp/LocalAI/TGI,
-- 8000 vLLM, 4000 LiteLLM, 3000 Open WebUI, 3001 AnythingLLM,
-- 8188 ComfyUI, 9090 InvokeAI, 1000 Pieces, 8501 Streamlit,
-- 6333/6334 Qdrant, 19530 Milvus, 8265 Ray, 9099 PrivateGPT,
-- 5678 n8n, 8888 Jupyter
SELECT
    l.port,
    l.address,
    l.protocol,
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid
FROM listening_ports l
JOIN processes p ON l.pid = p.pid
WHERE l.port IN (
    11434, 1234, 43411, 4891, 1337, 5001, 7860,
    8080, 8000, 4000, 3000, 3001, 8188, 9090, 1000,
    8501, 6333, 6334, 19530, 8265, 9099, 5678, 8888
)
    AND l.address != '127.0.0.1'
    AND l.address != '::1';

-- AI API Servers Inventory (Including Localhost)
-- Inventories ALL AI services on known ports, including loopback
-- Complements ai_listening_ports which only flags network-exposed servers
SELECT
    l.port,
    l.address,
    l.protocol,
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid
FROM listening_ports l
JOIN processes p ON l.pid = p.pid
WHERE l.port IN (
    11434, 1234, 43411, 4891, 1337, 5001, 7860,
    8080, 8000, 4000, 3000, 3001, 8188, 9090, 1000,
    8501, 6333, 6334, 19530, 8265, 9099, 5678, 8888
);

-- Installed AI Packages (Linux)
-- Detects AI-related system packages via deb and rpm package managers
-- Covers: LLM runtimes, AI desktop apps, GPU/CUDA drivers, AI coding tools
SELECT name, version, source, 'deb' AS pkg_type FROM deb_packages
WHERE name LIKE '%ollama%'
    OR name LIKE '%cursor%'
    OR name LIKE '%windsurf%'
    OR name LIKE '%lmstudio%'
    OR name LIKE '%lm-studio%'
    OR name LIKE '%gpt4all%'
    OR name LIKE '%jan%'
    OR name LIKE '%chatgpt%'
    OR name LIKE '%claude%'
    OR name LIKE '%perplexity%'
    OR name LIKE '%deepseek%'
    OR name LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR name LIKE '%open-webui%'
    OR name LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR name LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR name LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR name LIKE '%nvidia-cuda%'
    OR name LIKE '%nvidia-cudnn%'
    OR name LIKE '%nvidia-driver%'
    OR name LIKE '%libnvidia%'
    OR name LIKE '%codeium%'
    OR name LIKE '%tabnine%'
    OR name LIKE '%amazon-q%'
    OR name LIKE '%pieces%'
    OR name LIKE '%zed-editor%'
    OR name LIKE '%warp-terminal%'
UNION ALL
SELECT name, version, source, 'rpm' AS pkg_type FROM rpm_packages
WHERE name LIKE '%ollama%'
    OR name LIKE '%cursor%'
    OR name LIKE '%windsurf%'
    OR name LIKE '%lmstudio%'
    OR name LIKE '%lm-studio%'
    OR name LIKE '%gpt4all%'
    OR name LIKE '%jan%'
    OR name LIKE '%chatgpt%'
    OR name LIKE '%claude%'
    OR name LIKE '%perplexity%'
    OR name LIKE '%deepseek%'
    OR name LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR name LIKE '%open-webui%'
    OR name LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR name LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR name LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR name LIKE '%cuda%'
    OR name LIKE '%nvidia-driver%'
    OR name LIKE '%libnvidia%'
    OR name LIKE '%codeium%'
    OR name LIKE '%tabnine%'
    OR name LIKE '%amazon-q%'
    OR name LIKE '%pieces%'
    OR name LIKE '%zed-editor%'
    OR name LIKE '%warp-terminal%';

-- Running MCP Server Processes
-- Detects Model Context Protocol servers bridging AI tools to local resources
-- MCP servers provide filesystem, database, and API access to AI assistants
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.cmdline LIKE '%@modelcontextprotocol/%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-server-%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp_server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%fastmcp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%smithery%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcpx%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-run%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%glama%mcp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-proxy%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-gateway%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%supergateway%';

-- MCP Configuration Files (Linux)
-- Detects MCP config files for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE path LIKE '/home/%/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.claude.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.claude/settings.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cursor/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.mcp.json';

-- AI Model Files (Linux)
-- Detects large model files (>100MB) in known AI model storage directories
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/home/%/.ollama/models/blobs/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.lmstudio/models/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/huggingface/hub/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/llama.cpp/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.local/share/nomic.ai/GPT4All/%'
    OR path LIKE '/opt/models/%'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files by Extension (Linux)
-- Detects model weight files by extension in user and opt directories
-- Includes both shallow (home dir) and known deep paths for full coverage
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    -- Shallow: files directly in user home or one level down
    path LIKE '/home/%/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.llamafile'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.ggml'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.onnx'
    OR path LIKE '/opt/%/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/opt/%/%.safetensors'
    -- Deep: known model cache directories
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/huggingface/hub/%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/llama.cpp/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.local/share/nomic.ai/GPT4All/%.gguf'
    -- Downloads folder (common drop location)
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/Downloads/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/Downloads/%.safetensors'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI/ML Python Packages
-- Detects installed AI frameworks, model libraries, agent toolkits, and AI SDKs
SELECT
    name,
    version,
    directory
FROM python_packages
WHERE name IN (
    -- Core ML frameworks
    'torch', 'tensorflow', 'onnxruntime', 'jax', 'flax',
    -- HuggingFace ecosystem
    'transformers', 'diffusers', 'accelerate', 'peft', 'trl',
    'huggingface-hub', 'tokenizers', 'datasets', 'sentence-transformers',
    'safetensors',
    -- AI provider SDKs
    'openai', 'anthropic', 'google-generativeai', 'cohere', 'replicate',
    'groq', 'mistralai', 'together', 'fireworks-ai', 'deepseek-sdk',
    -- Agent/orchestration frameworks
    'langchain', 'langchain-core', 'langchain-community',
    'llama-index', 'llama-index-core',
    'autogen', 'crewai', 'semantic-kernel', 'haystack-ai', 'dspy-ai',
    'instructor', 'guidance', 'outlines',
    -- Local inference
    'llama-cpp-python', 'ollama', 'vllm', 'ctransformers',
    'bitsandbytes', 'auto-gptq', 'exllama',
    -- MCP
    'fastmcp', 'mcp',
    -- Vector databases
    'chromadb', 'qdrant-client', 'weaviate-client', 'pinecone-client',
    'pymilvus', 'faiss-cpu', 'faiss-gpu',
    -- AI coding agents
    'aider-chat', 'shell-gpt', 'mentat',
    -- AI app frameworks
    'gradio', 'streamlit',
    -- Audio/speech
    'openai-whisper', 'whisper', 'elevenlabs', 'bark',
    -- Proxy/gateway
    'litellm',
    -- LLM CLI tools
    'llm'
);

-- AI Browser Extensions (Chrome/Chromium/Edge)
-- Detects AI-related browser extensions for chat, coding, writing, and search
SELECT
    ce.name,
    ce.identifier,
    ce.version,
    ce.description,
    ce.path,
    u.username
FROM chrome_extensions ce
LEFT JOIN users u ON ce.uid = u.uid
WHERE
    -- AI assistants & chat
    ce.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Merlin%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Sider%' OR ce.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%UseChatGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Poe%'
    -- AI coding
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Cody%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Codeium%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Tabnine%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Blackbox%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Phind%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Bito%'
    -- AI writing & productivity
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Grammarly%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Jasper%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Wordtune%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Quillbot%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%QuillBot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Compose AI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Writesonic%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Copy.ai%'
    -- AI search & research
    OR ce.name LIKE '%You.com%' OR ce.name LIKE '%AIPRM%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%WebChatGPT%'
    -- AI summarization
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Glasp%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Eightify%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%NoteGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%tl;dv%'
    -- AI translation
    OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%';

-- AI Docker Containers
-- Detects containers with AI/ML, MCP, vector DB, or image generation images
SELECT
    id,
    name,
    image,
    status,
    command,
    started_at
FROM docker_containers
WHERE
    -- LLM serving
    image LIKE '%ollama%' OR image LIKE '%vllm%'
    OR image LIKE '%text-generation%' OR image LIKE '%localai%'
    OR image LIKE '%llama.cpp%' OR image LIKE '%litellm%'
    -- ML frameworks
    OR image LIKE '%pytorch%' OR image LIKE '%tensorflow%'
    OR image LIKE '%triton%' OR image LIKE '%huggingface%'
    -- MCP servers
    OR image LIKE '%mcp%' OR image LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%'
    -- AI apps
    OR image LIKE '%open-webui%' OR image LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR image LIKE '%flowise%' OR image LIKE '%langflow%'
    -- Vector databases
    OR image LIKE '%chromadb%' OR image LIKE '%chroma%'
    OR image LIKE '%qdrant%' OR image LIKE '%weaviate%'
    OR image LIKE '%milvus%' OR image LIKE '%pinecone%'
    -- Image generation
    OR image LIKE '%comfyui%' OR image LIKE '%stable-diffusion%'
    OR image LIKE '%invokeai%' OR image LIKE '%automatic1111%'
    -- AI workflow/agents
    OR image LIKE '%n8n%' OR image LIKE '%openhands%'
    OR image LIKE '%sweepai%' OR image LIKE '%pr-agent%';

-- MCP npm Packages (Linux)
-- Detects installed Model Context Protocol npm packages
-- Uses file table to scan for package.json because osquery runs as root
-- and npm_packages table may not discover global/user installs
SELECT
    f.directory,
    f.path,
    f.filename
FROM file f
WHERE (
    -- Global npm (npm install -g)
    f.path LIKE '/usr/lib/node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/usr/lib/node_modules/mcp-server-%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/usr/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/usr/local/lib/node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/usr/local/lib/node_modules/mcp-server-%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/usr/local/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/%/package.json'
    -- NVM installs
    OR f.path LIKE '/home/%/.nvm/versions/node/%/lib/node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/home/%/.nvm/versions/node/%/lib/node_modules/mcp-server-%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/home/%/.nvm/versions/node/%/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/%/package.json'
    -- User home node_modules
    OR f.path LIKE '/home/%/node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/home/%/node_modules/mcp-server-%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/home/%/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/%/package.json'
    -- Root home
    OR f.path LIKE '/root/node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/root/node_modules/mcp-server-%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/root/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/%/package.json'
);

-- GPU-Equipped Systems (AI Inference Capability)
-- Detects NVIDIA, AMD, and Apple Silicon GPUs capable of running local LLMs
-- GPU presence + AI software = high-confidence shadow AI indicator
SELECT
    vendor,
    model,
    pci_class,
    pci_subclass,
    driver
FROM pci_devices
WHERE
    (vendor LIKE '%NVIDIA%' AND (pci_class = '0300' OR pci_class = '0302'))
    OR (vendor LIKE '%Advanced Micro Devices%' AND pci_class = '0300')
    OR vendor LIKE '%Apple%GPU%';

-- AI Tool Configuration Directories (Linux)
-- Detects AI tool config directories in user home directories
-- Note: osquery file table path LIKE '/home/%/.dirname' does NOT work
-- (mid-path % only works for end-of-path enumeration).
-- Instead use directory column with LIKE '/home/%/' to enumerate user homes,
-- then filter by filename.
SELECT
    path,
    type,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE directory LIKE '/home/%/'
AND (
    (type = 'directory' AND filename IN (
        '.ollama', 'jan', '.continue', '.cursor', '.codeium',
        '.tabnine', '.claude', '.supermaven', '.anythingllm',
        '.invokeai'
    ))
    OR filename = '.aider.conf.yml'
)
UNION
SELECT
    path,
    type,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE directory LIKE '/home/%/.cache/'
AND type = 'directory'
AND filename IN (
    'lm-studio', 'huggingface', 'gpt4all', 'llama.cpp'
)
UNION
SELECT
    path,
    type,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE directory LIKE '/home/%/.config/'
AND type = 'directory'
AND filename IN (
    'github-copilot', 'shell_gpt'
);

-- AI Browser Extensions (Firefox)
-- Detects AI-related browser extensions installed in Firefox
-- Complements ai_chrome_extensions for full browser coverage
SELECT
    fa.name,
    fa.identifier,
    fa.version,
    fa.description,
    fa.path,
    fa.active,
    u.username
FROM firefox_addons fa
LEFT JOIN users u ON fa.uid = u.uid
WHERE
    -- AI assistants & chat
    fa.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR fa.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR fa.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Merlin%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Sider%' OR fa.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%UseChatGPT%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Poe%'
    -- AI coding
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Cody%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Codeium%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Tabnine%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Blackbox%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Phind%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Bito%'
    -- AI writing & productivity
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Grammarly%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Jasper%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Wordtune%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Quillbot%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%QuillBot%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Compose AI%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Writesonic%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Copy.ai%'
    -- AI search & research
    OR fa.name LIKE '%You.com%' OR fa.name LIKE '%AIPRM%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%WebChatGPT%'
    -- AI summarization
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Glasp%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Eightify%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%NoteGPT%' OR fa.name LIKE '%tl;dv%'
    -- AI translation
    OR fa.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%';

-- AI API Credential Exposure (Linux)
-- Detects files likely containing AI service API keys and credentials
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/home/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.env.local'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/projects/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/src/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/code/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/repos/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.openai'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.anthropic'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/openai/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/anthropic/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/groq/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/cohere/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/huggingface/token'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.huggingface/token'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.ollama/auth'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/litellm_config.yaml'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.litellm/config.yaml'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/shell_gpt/.sgptrc'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.aider.conf.yml'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.aider.env'
)
AND size > 0;

-- Running Jupyter Notebook/Lab Servers
-- Detects Jupyter servers which are common AI development environments
-- Jupyter servers may expose notebooks with sensitive data, model training code,
-- and API credentials to the network
-- Note: jupyter often runs as python3 interpreter, so cmdline matching is essential
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'jupyter', 'jupyter-lab', 'jupyter-notebook',
    'jupyter-server', 'jupyterhub', 'jupyterhub-singleuser'
)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%notebook%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%lab%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyterhub%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter-notebook%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter_core%'
    OR (p.name = 'python3' AND p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%')
    OR (p.name = 'python' AND p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%');

-- AI VS Code Extensions (Linux)
-- Detects AI-related VS Code extensions installed on the system
-- VS Code extensions are stored as directories under ~/.vscode/extensions/
SELECT
    path,
    filename AS extension_id,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/github.copilot%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/github.copilot-chat%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/continue.continue%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/sourcegraph.cody%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/codeium.codeium%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/tabnine.tabnine%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/amazonwebservices.amazon-q%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/supermaven.supermaven%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/blackboxapp.blackbox%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/pieces.pieces-vscode%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/phind.phind%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/bito.bito%'
)
AND type = 'directory';

-- AI Auto-Start Services (Linux systemd)
-- Detects AI tools configured as systemd services on Linux
-- Adapted from: services_suspicious_linux_elastic, startup_items_linux_elastic
-- Closes the Linux auto-start gap (macOS launchd and Windows services already covered)
SELECT
    su.id AS unit_id,
    su.description,
    su.load_state,
    su.active_state,
    su.sub_state,
    su.unit_file_state,
    su.fragment_path,
    datetime(f.mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM systemd_units su
LEFT JOIN file f ON f.path = su.fragment_path
WHERE su.id LIKE '%.service'
    AND su.fragment_path IS NOT NULL
    AND su.fragment_path != ''
    AND (
        -- LLM runtimes
        su.id LIKE '%ollama%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%lmstudio%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%llama%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%vllm%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%litellm%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%localai%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%gpt4all%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%koboldcpp%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%text-generation%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%open-webui%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%anythingllm%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%jan%ai%'
        -- MCP servers
        OR su.id LIKE '%mcp-server%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%mcp_server%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%'
        -- AI apps
        OR su.id LIKE '%comfyui%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%invokeai%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%stable-diffusion%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%whisper%'
        -- Jupyter
        OR su.id LIKE '%jupyter%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%jupyterhub%'
        -- Vector databases
        OR su.id LIKE '%chromadb%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%qdrant%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%weaviate%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%milvus%'
        -- Also check fragment_path for binaries
        OR su.fragment_path LIKE '%ollama%'
        OR su.fragment_path LIKE '%llama-server%'
        OR su.fragment_path LIKE '%litellm%'
        OR su.fragment_path LIKE '%mcp-server%'
        OR su.fragment_path LIKE '%jupyter%'
    );

-- AI Cron Jobs (Linux)
-- Detects AI tools scheduled via crontab
-- Adapted from: crontab_linux_elastic
SELECT
    c.command,
    c.path AS crontab_path,
    c.minute,
    c.hour,
    c.day_of_month,
    c.month,
    c.day_of_week
FROM crontab c
WHERE c.command IS NOT NULL
    AND c.command != ''
    AND (
        LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%ollama%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%llama-server%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%llama.cpp%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%litellm%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%localai%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%vllm%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%gpt4all%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%anythingllm%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%open-webui%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%koboldcpp%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%comfyui%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%invokeai%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%stable-diffusion%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%mcp-server%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%mcp_server%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%jupyter%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%whisper%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%huggingface%'
    );

-- AI Service Network Connections
-- Detects active connections to known AI service endpoints
-- Complements ai_dns_cache_windows for macOS/Linux which lack dns_cache table
SELECT DISTINCT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    pos.remote_address,
    pos.remote_port,
    pos.local_port,
    pos.protocol
FROM process_open_sockets pos
JOIN processes p ON pos.pid = p.pid
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE pos.remote_port IN (443, 80)
    AND pos.state = 'ESTABLISHED'
    AND pos.remote_address NOT IN ('127.0.0.1', '::1', '0.0.0.0', '::')
    AND (
        -- Match by process name (known AI tools making outbound connections)
        p.name IN (
            'ollama', 'cursor', 'Cursor', 'Cursor Helper',
            'claude', 'Claude', 'claude-code',
            'copilot-agent', 'copilot',
            'windsurf', 'Windsurf',
            'aider', 'cline', 'codeium',
            'ChatGPT', 'chatgpt'
        )
        -- Match by cmdline for tools running via interpreters
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openai%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%anthropic%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%langchain%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%huggingface%'
    );

-- Vector Database Process Detection
-- Detects running vector database engines (Qdrant, Milvus, Chroma, Weaviate, etc.)
-- Vector DBs power RAG pipelines and often hold sensitive corporate data
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN ('qdrant', 'milvus', 'weaviate', 'chroma')
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%chromadb%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%qdrant%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%weaviate%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%milvus%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pinecone%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pgvector%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%lancedb%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%faiss%';

-- AI Model Cache Size Detection (Linux)
-- Reports total size of model cache directories (>100MB threshold)
-- Large model caches indicate active local AI usage
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.ollama/models%' THEN 'ollama'
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.cache/huggingface%' THEN 'huggingface'
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.cache/lm-studio%' THEN 'lm-studio'
    END AS ai_tool,
    CASE
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.ollama/models%' THEN '/home/*/.ollama/models'
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.cache/huggingface%' THEN '/home/*/.cache/huggingface'
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.cache/lm-studio%' THEN '/home/*/.cache/lm-studio'
    END AS cache_path,
    SUM(f.size) AS total_bytes,
    COUNT(*) AS file_count
FROM file f
WHERE (
    f.directory LIKE '/home/%/.ollama/models%'
    OR f.directory LIKE '/home/%/.cache/huggingface%'
    OR f.directory LIKE '/home/%/.cache/lm-studio%'
)
    AND f.type = 'regular'
GROUP BY ai_tool
HAVING total_bytes > 104857600;

-- SSH Tunnel Detection for AI Services
-- Detects SSH port forwarding tunnels that expose AI service ports
-- Catches developers tunneling local LLMs to remote access
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name = 'ssh'
    AND (
        p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:11434:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:8080:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:8000:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:3000:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:7860:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:1234:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:8888:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:6333:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:11434:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:8080:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:8000:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:3000:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:7860:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:1234:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:8888:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:6333:%'
    );
